notes:
**New**

- **Sync size limits keep large images on-device** — images over 10 MB, and
  any image once a vault reaches its plan's storage limit, stay fully usable on
  the device that has them but don't sync to your other devices. A dismissable
  Alerts notice tells you when this happens and why. Nothing is ever deleted or
  lost; everything stays local. (PRD Addendum 17 §Q8.)

**Under the hood**

- The sync server now enforces a per-vault storage cap (2 GB on Standard) at
  the upload step: an over-cap upload is refused before any bytes move, and the
  client skips it and surfaces the notice above. The server still never sees
  image contents — only a blob's size and existence. (PRD Addendum 17 §Q8.3.)
- Sync can now be turned off per release channel from remote config (not just
  the global kill switch). When it's off, the Settings → Sync panel is hidden
  entirely rather than shown non-functional. (PRD Addendum 14 §N4.)
